content: Public professional profile: Devin Marsh — Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe, full-time from 2017 to mid-2020.
Corevance product is live and matches the deck: an AI copilot that drafts SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance evidence. Verified against the public site and docs.
Conference talk 'Building Reliable Payment Ledgers', QCon SF, November 2018. Speaker: Devin Marsh, affiliation Stripe.
Conference talk 'Infra at Scale', Strange Loop, September 2019. Speaker: Devin Marsh, affiliation Stripe.
EDGAR full-text search for a Form D filing for DataLoom's claimed $4M seed round: NO filing found. Negative result — searched, nothing on record.
Reviewed Cisco's 2021 acquisition announcements: DataLoom does NOT appear among them. Negative result — the claimed acquisition is not in the public record.

Market: compliance evidence collection is a persistent, budgeted pain with proven willingness to pay. Incumbents Vanta and Drata are checklist-oriented; agentic evidence drafting is a plausible wedge.
